_comment: Scraping targets — 11 high-signal accounts. Restart bot to apply changes.

accounts.name: Eleanor Terrett
accounts.notes: Fox Business. Best source on SEC, CFTC and US crypto legislation. Breaks exclusive scoops.

accounts.name: ZachXBT
accounts.notes: On-chain investigator. Tracks hacks, fraud, and scams. Strong signal on security incidents.

accounts.name: Yueqi Yang
accounts.notes: The Information, ex-Bloomberg. Breaks institutional scoops on stablecoins and TradFi x crypto.

accounts.name: Laura Shin
accounts.notes: Unchained podcast. Top crypto journalist, in-depth interviews and industry scoops.

accounts.name: The Block
accounts.notes: Best institutional crypto news source. Covers funding rounds, exchanges and regulation.

accounts.name: CoinTelegraph
accounts.notes: High-volume general crypto news. Good for breaking news and broad market coverage.

accounts.name: Token Terminal
accounts.notes: Protocol fundamentals — revenue, TVL, P/F ratio. Signal on who is actually making money.

accounts.name: a16z Crypto
accounts.notes: Andreessen Horowitz crypto arm. Investment theses signal trends 6-12 months ahead.

accounts.name: Pantera Capital
accounts.notes: Macro crypto and institutional focus. Signals on market cycles and capital allocation.

accounts.name: Parafi Capital
accounts.notes: DeFi, infrastructure and RWA focus. Early signal on emerging sectors to watch.

accounts.name: Glassnode
accounts.notes: On-chain analytics platform. Institutional flows, BTC positioning, volatility data.
